title: User Guide
content_html:
User Guide

This section is for:

  • concrete "what do I do?" guidance on user-facing pages, modals etc
  • exact syntax to type into source files
  • where import files should be saved
  • specific workflows that a person follows while editing the site or its docs

The technical docs remain the source of truth for contracts, implementation details, and generated output behavior. User Guide pages should focus on actions, examples, and decision help first.

Current guides:

  • Docs Images And Assets
  • Docs Import
  • Catalogue Work Editor
  • Catalogue Work Detail Editor
  • Catalogue Series Editor
  • Catalogue Moment Editor

When a practical workflow starts to feel buried inside a technical doc, prefer moving the how-to guidance here and leaving a short cross-reference behind in the technical reference.
